feature: izba desktop app (GUI dogfood walking skeleton)

journeys.rationale: A user can create a sandbox from the app and see it appear.

steps.intent: create a new sandbox named web using the default image
steps.expect: a sandbox named web appears in the sandbox list

journeys.rationale: A user can start a created sandbox and the app shows it running.
A user can open a shell into a running sandbox.

steps.intent: create and start a sandbox named web
open a shell or terminal for web
steps.expect: a terminal/shell view for web is shown

journeys.rationale: A user can turn on firewall enforcement for a sandbox.

steps.intent: open web's firewall/policy settings and turn enforcement on
steps.expect: the firewall for web shows as enforcing

journeys.rationale: A user can remove a sandbox and it disappears from the app.

steps.intent: remove the sandbox named web, confirming if asked
steps.expect: web no longer appears in the sandbox list
